channel.title: Quality Gates on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Quality Gates on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: GitHub Code Quality generally available July 20, 2026
item.description:
GitHub Code Quality, currently in public preview, will reach general availability on July 20, 2026. The preview has been used by enterprises to detect maintainability and reliability issues, enforce quality gates, and track code coverage.

  • Source: GitHub
